import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; const About = () => { return (

About Me

Umme Habiba

UI/UX Designer

I am a passionate UI/UX designer specializing in mobile and web interface design, creating modern, user-friendly digital experiences through research, wireframing, prototyping, and visual design in Figma.

My approach combines usability, aesthetics, and real-world problem solving. I am currently pursuing an MBA alongside hands-on UX design projects and internships.

); }; export default About;
